discussionforum-maintenance-backfill-sum: Description shown by maintenance/backfillForumAnnotations.php when run with --help. Explains that the script is for backfilling existing topics that pre-date the extension load.
discussionforum-prop-has-forum: Label of the SMW property that points each topic page back at its containing forum landing page. Used in chained #ask queries like [[Has forum.Has parent forum::Forum:Home]] for activity feeds. Internal property ID is ___forum_parent.
discussionforum-prop-topic-subject: Label of the SMW property that mirrors the first H2 heading on a topic page. Internal property ID is ___forum_subject.
discussionforum-prop-topic-starter: Label of the SMW property that records the User: page of the topic's oldest reply author (the original poster). Internal property ID is ___forum_starter.
discussionforum-prop-comment-count: Label of the SMW property that records the DT-derived count of signed comments on a topic page. Internal property ID is ___forum_comments.
discussionforum-prop-participant-count: Label of the SMW property that records the DT-derived count of unique comment authors on a topic page. Internal property ID is ___forum_participants.
